umrah.title: Ihram
umrah.description: Enter the state of Ihram and declare your intention at the Miqat.
umrah.translation: Here I am, O Allah, for Umrah.

umrah.title: Tawaf
umrah.description: Circumambulate the Kaaba seven times counter-clockwise.
umrah.arabic: رَبَّنَا آتِنَا فِي الدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةً وَفِي الْآخِرَةِ حَسَنَةً وَقِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ
umrah.translation: Our Lord, give us in this world [that which is] good and in the Hereafter [that which is] good and protect us from the punishment of the Fire.

umrah.title: Sa’i
umrah.description: Walk seven times between the hills of Safa and Marwa.
umrah.arabic: إِنَّ الصَّفَا وَالْمَرْوَةَ مِن شَعَائِرِ اللَّهِ
umrah.translation: Indeed, as-Safa and al-Marwah are among the symbols of Allah.

hajj.title: Day 1: Mina
hajj.description: Travel to Mina on the 8th of Dhul Hijjah and stay there for the night.
hajj.arabic: لَبَّيْكَ اللَّهُمَّ لَبَّيْكَ، لَبَّيْكَ لاَ شَرِيكَ لَكَ لَبَّيْكَ
hajj.translation: Here I am, O Allah, here I am. Here I am, You have no partner, here I am.

hajj.title: Day 2: Arafat
hajj.description: Stay in Arafat on the 9th until sunset. This is the pinnacle of Hajj.
hajj.arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ، وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
hajj.translation: There is no god but Allah, alone, without partner. His is the sovereignty, and His is the praise, and He is over all things powerful.
